content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File

Date: April 6, 1983
File No.: T-83-093

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Janis Shank McLean

Subject: Advice to Janet Gladfelter,
Stockton City Attorney

A Stockton ordinance allows agents to file applications. The person filing the application and the person owning the property being affected by the Planning Commission must disclose their contributions. (See 2 Cal. Adm. Code Sectin 18438.3.)

JSM:plh
